title: 菊花賞の後に・静かなる宣言

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Brother... I... I...
choice_data_list:
You caught up to Mihono Bourbon... and passed
her.

You caught up to Mihono Bourbon... and passed
her.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Sister... I... I...
choice_data_list:
You caught up to Mihono Bourbon... and passed
her.

You caught up to Mihono Bourbon... and passed
her.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I... I did!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I did it... I did it!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Rice.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Gyah! Bourbon?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Uh, uh... Um, I...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Yes. You "caught up" to me.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Speaking truthfully, I do not understand why you
choose those words.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: In a race, there is only victory or defeat.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: There is no "catching up." Yet...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
High levels of frustration detected. To think that I
would lose the Kikuka Sho—that I would not win.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...That you would catch up to me.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Can you hear that?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: What a race! Good job, Bourbon! Good job, Rice!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
As expected of this year's stars! I'm so excited to
see them again next year!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Th-they're not just cheering for you... They're
cheering for me too?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
B-but I only got this far because I was chasing
after you...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Incorrect. The crowd has acknowledged you as a
worthy champion of this year's Classics.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
And my analysis produces similar results.
Therefore, I have just one thing to say...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Next time, I will not lose to you...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: My rival.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm your... rival?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Rice. Will you race against me again?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I won't get complacent just because I won today!
I'll keep getting faster... and win our next race
too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower's voice echoes loudly. Her daring
declaration reaches the ears of not only those
nearby, but everyone at the racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think about what race she should run in next to
help her talent as a stayer bloom even further.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
First, we'll prepare for the Nikkei Sho as a
jumping-off point.
